title: Itô formula, L² (C³ bounded — Summit A)
text:
The continuous-time $L^2$ Itô formula
  $f(B_T) - f(B_0) = \int_0^T f'(B_s)\,dB_s + \tfrac12\int_0^T f''(B_s)\,ds$ for
  $C^3$ functions with bounded derivatives, proved from primitives (weighted QV,
  Taylor remainder, Riemann↔CLM bridge). Unbounded coefficients (e.g. GBM's
  exponential) are honestly out of scope — the named gap.
name: MathFin.ito_formula_L2_bddDeriv
label: thm:ito-formula-l2

title: Continuous-time first FTAP (EMM)
text:
Under the risk-neutral measure the discounted price
  $e^{-rt}S_t$ is a continuous-time martingale, straight from the Wald
  exponential — the defining EMM property, with no stochastic-integral
  machinery.
name: MathFin.discountedGBM_isMartingale
label: thm:continuous-ftap

title: bs_identity: S·φ(d₁) = Ke^{−rτ}·φ(d₂)
text:
The algebraic collapse that cancels the pdf cross-terms —
  a self-contained root (only the $d_1/d_2$ definitions and the Gaussian
  density), feeding every clean Greek formula and the PDE.
name: MathFin.bs_identity
label: thm:bs-identity

title: Carr–Madan static replication
text:
Every twice-differentiable payoff decomposes as cash, a
  forward, and a static book of OTM options weighted by its convexity $f''$ —
  one integration by parts plus a positive-part case split. The log payoff
  specializes to the variance-swap $1/K^2$ strip.
name: MathFin.carrMadan_spanning
label: thm:carr-madan

title: Binomial martingale representation (completeness)
text:
On the binomial tree every martingale is the discrete
  stochastic integral of a *predictable* hedge: $H = \Delta M/\Delta S$, fixed
  before the flip — completeness, the second pillar of the FTAP, purely
  algebraic and pathwise.
name: MathFin.binomial_martingale_representation
label: thm:binomial-representation

title: Discrete Itô formula (pathwise)
text:
The exact pathwise identity
  $f(X_N) - f(X_0) = \sum f'(X_k)\Delta X_k + \tfrac12 \sum f''(X_k)(\Delta X_k)^2
  + \sum R_k$ — Itô's lemma before any limit is taken.
name: MathFin.discrete_ito_formula
label: thm:discrete-ito

title: BSCallHyp from a Brownian model
text:
A concrete Brownian-driven physical model produces the pricing
  hypothesis directly — the second route into `BSCallHyp`.
name: MathFin.BSCallHyp.of_isPreBrownian
label: thm:bscallhyp-brownian

title: Esscher tilt is the Gaussian Girsanov
text:
Tilting the physical Gaussian by an exponential density yields
  an equivalent probability measure with shifted mean — static Girsanov,
  constructed, not assumed.
name: MathFin.hasLaw_esscher_tilt
label: thm:esscher-tilt

title: Itô for x² in L²: ∑B·ΔB → ½(B_T²−B₀²−T)
text:
The continuous $L^2$ form for $x^2$: Riemann sums of
  $B\,dB$ converge along the uniform partition — one algebraic step from the
  discrete identity plus the $L^2$ quadratic variation. The
  $B_t^2 = 2\int B\,dB + t$ keystone behind variance-swap pricing.
name: MathFin.itoSquared_L2_tendsto_div2
label: thm:ito-squared-l2

title: BS PDE ↔ Itô-drift balance (algebraic)
text:
The PDE is *algebraically equivalent* to the Itô-drift balance
  $\text{drift} - rV = 0$, routed through the shared `itoDrift2D`. Deferred, by
  name: deriving drift $=0$ *from* the no-arbitrage $Q$-martingale (needs the
  time-dependent Itô formula on the unbounded-Γ value function).
name: MathFin.bs_pde_from_no_arbitrage
label: thm:bs-pde-no-arb

title: Margrabe exchange option
text:
The option to exchange one asset for another prices as a BS
  call on the ratio with effective volatility
  $\sqrt{\sigma_1^2 + \sigma_2^2 - 2\rho\sigma_1\sigma_2}$ — the multivariate
  corollary.
name: MathFin.margrabe_price_of_gaussian
label: thm:margrabe

title: Black–Scholes call formula
text:
Under `BSCallHyp`, the call price is
  $S_0\Phi(d_1) - Ke^{-rT}\Phi(d_2)$.
name: MathFin.bs_call_formula
label: thm:bs-call

title: Brownian motion (Degenne, upstream)
text:
The driving noise: independent stationary Gaussian increments,
  $B_t \sim N(0,t)$ — `IsPreBrownian`, consumed from Rémy Degenne's
  `brownian-motion` package, on which this library builds.
name: ProbabilityTheory.IsPreBrownian
label: def:brownian-motion

title: GBM coefficient matching (algebraic)
text:
$S(t,B_t)$ with $S = S_0 e^{(\mu-\sigma^2/2)t+\sigma x}$ matches
  the Itô coefficients of $dS = \mu S\,dt + \sigma S\,dB$: genuine `HasDerivAt`
  partials + the 2D Itô drift. Honestly *coefficient matching*, not a continuous
  SDE-solution theorem — the $-\sigma^2/2$ cancellation IS the Itô correction.
name: MathFin.gbm_solves_sde
label: thm:gbm-sde

title: Call price from the physical measure
text:
Under the Esscher-derived risk-neutral measure the call price
  is the discounted expectation: **the risk-neutral measure is a theorem, not an
  axiom** — `BSCallHyp` stops being a hypothesis.
name: MathFin.bs_call_formula_of_physical
label: thm:girsanov-call

title: Quadratic variation: ∑(ΔB)² → T in L²
text:
Along refining partitions, $\sum_k (B_{t_{k+1}}-B_{t_k})^2 \to T$
  in $L^2$: realized variance accumulates linearly in time at unit rate — the
  root of the "$\sigma^2 \cdot$ time" that pervades pricing.
name: MathFin.QuadraticVariationL2.tendsto_qv
label: thm:quadratic-variation

title: Wiener isometry (deterministic L²)
text:
For deterministic step integrands,
  $E[(\int \varphi\,dB)^2] = \int \varphi^2\,dt$: the $L^2$ geometry of a fixed
  (non-reacting) position in Brownian noise.
name: MathFin.WienerIntegralL2.wiener_assembly_isometry
label: thm:wiener-isometry

title: Greeks (δ shown; γ vega θ ρ alongside)
name: MathFin.hasDerivAt_bsV_S
label: thm:bs-delta

title: Adapted Itô isometry
text:
For random *adapted* simple integrands,
  $E[(\sum_k \varphi_k \Delta B_k)^2] = \sum_k E[\varphi_k^2]\,\Delta t_k$ — the
  cross terms vanish by the weak Markov property, the exact point where Itô
  departs from Wiener.
name: MathFin.ItoIsometryAdapted.ito_isometry_discrete
label: thm:ito-isometry-adapted

title: ∫₀ᵀ B dB = ½(B_T² − B₀² − T)
text:
The CLM's first genuine consumer: $\int_0^T B\,dB$ computed
  *through the abstract integral*, agreeing with the quadratic-variation limit —
  the clamp-truncation + isometry-Cauchy template any unbounded-coefficient
  consumer would reuse.
name: MathFin.ItoIntegralBrownian.itoIntegralCLM_T_brownian
label: thm:ito-integral-brownian

title: Black–Scholes PDE (from the closed form)
text:
The closed-form price satisfies
  $\theta + rS\delta + \tfrac12\sigma^2S^2\gamma - rV = 0$, verified through the
  Greeks and `bs_identity`.
name: MathFin.bs_pde_holds
label: thm:bs-pde

title: CRR → Black–Scholes convergence
text:
The binomial call price converges to the Black–Scholes call
  price: charFun → Lévy continuity → weak convergence, with put–call parity
  lifting the (bounded) put's convergence to the call.
name: MathFin.binomialPrice_call_tendsto_bs
label: thm:crr-bs-convergence

title: Expectation-form Itô / Feynman–Kac
text:
$E[f(B_t)] = f(0) + \tfrac12 \int_0^t E[f''(B_s)]\,ds$, proved
  via the heat equation: the $\tfrac12\sigma^2$ second-order term that drives the
  Black–Scholes PDE.
name: MathFin.FeynmanKacHeatEquation.expectation_ito
label: thm:expectation-ito

title: Continuous Itô integral (CLM on [0,T])
text:
The discrete isometry extended to a continuous linear isometry
  on predictable $L^2$ integrands over $[0,T]$, via density of simple processes
  (Dynkin π-λ on predictable rectangles) and `LinearMap.extendOfNorm`.
name: MathFin.ItoIntegralCLM.itoIntegralCLM_T
label: def:ito-integral-clm
